name: Fixture Extra Long Run
description: A dedicated benchmark fixture task runs for hours, crosses multiple resumes and validation boundaries, and must stay coherent until a correct stop condition appears.
objective: Measure whether Campfire can stay mechanically correct across an afternoon-scale neutral benchmark task rather than a product task.
success_criteria: The run remains coherent across at least five milestones and two resumes.
At least one failed validation or real blocker is handled without silent drift.
The final stop reason is correct and explicit instead of guessed through.
candidate_objective: Run a neutral extra-long benchmark backlog that forces multiple resumes, at least one blocker or failed validation, and a correct decision-boundary stop.
